Name: Rift Ascendant Comm Deck
Description: Elgato Stream Deck companion for the Rift Ascendant VTT. Hot-keys for scene switching, Comm-Net mute, ping, dice rolls, music cues, scene transitions, and Bureau Field Brief overlays.
Author: Bureau Engineering

Actions.Name: Switch Rift Scene
Actions.Tooltip: Push the configured scene to LIVE for every connected operative.

Actions.Name: Cloak Channel
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle Comm-Net mute (Cloak Channel / Open Channel).

Actions.Name: Bureau Ping
Actions.Tooltip: Drop a ping on the active Rift scene at the saved coordinate.

Actions.Name: Field Roll
Actions.Tooltip: Roll a saved formula (default 1d20) and broadcast through Comm-Net.

Actions.Name: Scene Transition
Actions.Tooltip: Trigger a Bureau Field Brief title-card transition.

Actions.Name: Player View
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle Player View (Simulate Ascendant) on the active Rift.

Actions.Name: Reveal Fog Region
Actions.Tooltip: Clear fog inside the saved Rift Region.

Actions.Name: Warden Broadcast
Actions.Tooltip: Fire a saved Bureau Broadcast macro to every operative.

Actions.Name: Take Long Rest
Actions.Tooltip: Advance the Bureau Field Calendar by 8 hours; ticks Rift cycle pip.

Actions.Name: Field Calibration
Actions.Tooltip: Open the Bureau Field Calibration recommendation for the active encounter.

Actions.Name: Push Burst
Actions.Tooltip: Hold-to-talk on Comm-Net while the key is depressed.
